body.u: At 17 years old, I am going into the 6th year at the school for one year then I hope to get engaged to Shawn. At 18 I am going in the army for at least 10 years. I hope that at 20 that I will get married and I hope to have at least 2 girls before I am 23. I hope at 23 to live in Germany. At 30 I hope to live in England again. I hope to have a large house and 3 large sheep dogs. At 33 I would like to work at a office.
At 40 I hope to have all my kids left me so that I can go to different places with Shawn.
At 45 I would hope to own a farm, and have a lot of animals on it.
At 50 I expect I will be old but I would still like to own a farm.
At 60 I would like to have a farm still and a large house so that I can enjoy the last years of my life.
